creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Mon Jul 16 17:41:53 2012
New Revision: 300962
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/300962

Log:
  - update to 1.0.6, update MASTER_SITES [1]
  - move to optionsNG [2]
  - add in shared descriptions for {MYSQL,ORACLE,PGSQL}_JDBC [2]
  - add LICENSE [2]
  - modify startup-script for java sanity [2]
  
  PR:     ports/166244
  Submitted by:   maintainer jjuanino@gmail.com [1], jgh@ [2]

Modified:
  head/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk
  head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile
  head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo
  head/databases/powerarchitect/files/powerarchitect.in
  head/databases/powerarchitect/pkg-plist

Modified: head/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk
==============================================================================
--- head/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk	Mon Jul 16 17:38:33 2012	(r300961)
+++ head/Mk/bsd.options.desc.mk	Mon Jul 16 17:41:53 2012	(r300962)
@@ -166,6 +166,7 @@ MTP_DESC?=		MTP device support
 MULTIBYTE_DESC?=	multibyte character support
 MUSEPACK_DESC?=		Support MPC audio format
 MYSQL_DESC?=		MySQL backend
+MYSQL_JDBC_DESC?=	JDBC connection to MySQL databases
 NAS_DESC?=		Network Audio System support
 NETCDF_DESC?=		NetCDF support
 NETPBM_DESC?=		netpbm support
@@ -183,6 +184,7 @@ OPENMP_DESC?=		parallel processing suppo
 OPENSSL_DESC?=		SSL/TLS support via OpenSSL
 OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS_DESC?=	compilation optimizations
 ORACLE_DESC?=		Oracle support
+ORACLE_JDBC_DESC?=	JDBC connection to Oracle databases
 OSD_DESC?=		On-Screen-Display support
 OSS_DESC?=		Open Sound System support
 PAM_DESC?=		PAM support
@@ -190,6 +192,7 @@ PCRE_DESC?=		Use Perl Compatible Regular
 PDF_DESC?=		PDF support
 PERL_DESC?=		Perl scripting language support
 PGSQL_DESC?=		PostgreSQL backend
+PGSQL_JDBC_DESC?=	JDBC connection to PostgreSQL databases
 PHP_DESC?=		PHP binding/support
 PIXBUF_DESC?=		gdk-pixbuf support
 PNG_DESC?=		PNG support

Modified: head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile	Mon Jul 16 17:38:33 2012	(r300961)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile	Mon Jul 16 17:41:53 2012	(r300962)
@@ -6,18 +6,17 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	powerarchitect
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.12
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.6
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
-MASTER_SITES=	http://power-architect.googlecode.com/files/ \
-    		http://freshmeat.net/redir/powerarchitect/67980/url_tgz/
-DISTNAME=	Architect-generic-jdbc-${PORTVERSION}
+MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
+DISTNAME=	SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	jjuanino@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Data modeling and profiling tool
 
-OPTIONS=	ORACLE_JDBC "Enable JDBC connection to Oracle databases" off \
-		MYSQL_JDBC "Enable JDBC connection to MySQL databases" off \
-		PGSQL_JDBC "Enable JDBC connection to PostgreSQL databases" off
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	ORACLE_JDBC MYSQL_JDBC PGSQL_JDBC
 
 USE_JAVA=	yes
 
@@ -25,19 +24,20 @@ JAVA_VERSION=	1.5+
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
+PROJECTHOST=	power-architect
 DATADIR=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/architect-${PORTVERSION}
 SUB_FILES=	${PORTNAME}
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
-.if defined(WITH_ORACLE_JDBC)
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/ojdbc14.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/jdbc-oracle9i
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MORACLE_JDBC}
+RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/ojdbc-10.2.0.5.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/jdbc-oracle10g
 .endif
-.if defined(WITH_MYSQL_JDBC)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL_JDBC}
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/mysql-connector-java.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/mysql-connector-java
 .endif
-.if defined(WITH_PGSQL_JDBC)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL_JDBC}
 RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/postgresql.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/postgresql-jdbc
 .endif
 
@@ -49,9 +49,9 @@ do-install:
 	    ${COPYTREE_SHARE} lib ${DATADIR}
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
 
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README.generic ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 
-.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo	Mon Jul 16 17:38:33 2012	(r300961)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo	Mon Jul 16 17:41:53 2012	(r300962)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Architect-generic-jdbc-0.9.12.tar.gz) = 514eb63701f491231081eb6b6cc2749c90342b83521aa42c75a686c1985f6cd3
-SIZE (Architect-generic-jdbc-0.9.12.tar.gz) = 18059361
+SHA256 (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 26f03b6b5dc88007e9d6740bfc50a30a3248cee5c5da4a52bf272a88ea72e831
+SIZE (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 23492992

Modified: head/databases/powerarchitect/files/powerarchitect.in
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/files/powerarchitect.in	Mon Jul 16 17:38:33 2012	(r300961)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/files/powerarchitect.in	Mon Jul 16 17:41:53 2012	(r300962)
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 #!/bin/sh
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
 
-exec java -jar %%DATADIR%%/architect.jar
+JAVA_VERSION="%%JAVA_VERSION%%" exec "%%LOCALBASE%%/bin/java" -jar %%DATADIR%%/architect.jar
